title: BEFORE START

title: BEFORE START
item_P: CAUTION: FMS TOLD FUNCTION DOES NOT HAVE OBSTACLE DATABASE. WHEN USING TOLD, PILOT MUST VERIFY APPLICABLE OBSTACLE CLEARANCE DATA BEFORE TAKEOFF.

title: BEFORE START
item_P: WARNING:THE USE OF EAR PROTECTION IS REQUIRED IN THE CARGO COMPARTMENT FOR MISSIONS LONGER THAN ONE HOUR.THE USE OF EAR PROTECTION IS REQUIRED IN THE CARGO COMPARTMENT IF THE RAMP OR PARATROOP DOOR IS OPEN.

title: BEFORE START
item_P: No messages should be presented in the EICAS, except for the ones listed below, that do not preclude engines starting: CAUTION: BRK FAIL/PBIT TIME EXPIRED. ADVISORY: BRK ALTERNATE FAIL/BRK NORMAL FAIL.

title: ENGINE START
item_P: The recommended bleed duct pressure for engine start is supplied on Starter Air Pressure table in Supplementary Normal Checklist section.

title: ENGINE START
item_C: Repeat the sequence for the other engine.

title: SHUTDOWN
item_P: NOTE: Cabin differential pressure shall be equal to zero before operating the doors.

title: SHUTDOWN
item_P: NOTE: If the inertial knobs are turned OFF, the AUTOBRAKE FAIL and/or BRK SHORT DISPACH CAS messages may be displayed and can be disregarded. With airplane stopped, wait at least 5 seconds to turn off the electrical power. If the inertial knobs remain in NAV position, the stored heading function will not be available in the next airplane's power up.
